nodes.name: Golden-naped weaver
nodes.summary: Golden-naped weaver（Ploceus aureonucha）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Golden-naped weaver。

nodes.name: Golden-naped weaver
nodes.summary: The golden-naped weaver (Ploceus aureonucha) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is native to the Ituri Rainforest in northeastern Democratic Republic of the Congo. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
